overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, blending Japanese traditional design with cyberpunk aesthetics. The camera moves from a dim living area past a leather bag and drinks table toward a bright panoramic window overlooking a futuristic metropolis, then turns into a dark wood-paneled hallway with red accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living area with media console and luggage

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the living area toward the large window, passing a leather duffel bag and a glass table with champagne and ice bucket

entered.detail: tall dark wood storage cabinet with gold trim handles
low black media console with red accent lighting and gold decorative object on top
brown leather travel bag with visible straps and buckles
glass top table holding champagne bottle, ice bucket, and crystal glasses
floor-to-ceiling window revealing futuristic cityscape with bright daylight
futuristic metropolis with tall skyscrapers visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit, luxurious apartment living area with dark wood cabinetry and modern furniture. The camera moves forward past a leather duffel bag and a glass table set with champagne and ice, approaching a large panoramic window that reveals a sprawling futuristic city skyline in bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tatami platform with meditation cushions overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking along the tatami mat platform near the window, observing the city view and decorative red coral arrangements

entered.detail: raised platform with traditional Japanese tatami mat flooring and low wooden table
white circular meditation cushions placed on the tatami platform
decorative vase containing red illuminated branch-like coral structures
modern glass facade of neighboring high-rise building visible through window
black hardshell case with white logo sitting on the low table

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the bright window area featuring traditional Japanese tatami mats and round floor cushions. Red glowing coral decorations flank the window while the view of the futuristic city skyline and adjacent glass buildings dominates the scene. A black equipment case sits on the low table near the window as the camera moves along the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wood-paneled corridor with abstract art and red accent lighting

events.description: turning away from the bright window into a darker interior hallway with red LED accent lighting along the floor

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the window and entering a dark wood-paneled hallway, passing an abstract painting and shoji screens

entered.detail: vertical abstract artwork featuring blue and yellow neon-like streaks against dark background
traditional Japanese paper screen panels with wooden frames dividing the wall
continuous red LED strip lighting running along the base of the walls
floor-to-ceiling glass wall revealing exterior balcony and building structure
dark metal door at the end of the hallway with light reflecting off its surface

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the bright window into a dramatically darker corridor. An abstract painting with blue and yellow neon-like streaks hangs on the dark wood-paneled wall, illuminated by subtle red LED accent lighting along the floor. The space transitions from the open bright window area to an enclosed hallway with shoji screens and a glass partition wall revealing exterior structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: long dark hallway leading to exit door

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the dark hallway toward the door at the end, with glossy wooden floors reflecting the dim ambient light

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long, dark hallway with glossy dark wooden floors reflecting the minimal ambient light. The camera moves steadily toward the metal door at the end of the corridor, which grows larger in the frame. The glass partition wall remains visible on the left but recedes into the distance as the camera advances toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit interior toward a brilliant city vista before receding into a moody, enclosed corridor. It begins in a luxurious living area with dark wood cabinetry, gliding past a leather duffel bag and a champagne table toward a massive panoramic window. As the camera reaches the bright window area, the space opens up to reveal traditional tatami mats and glowing red coral decorations set against a sprawling, daylight futuristic skyline. The scene then shifts dramatically as the camera turns left, moving away from the light and into a dark wood-paneled hallway illuminated by red LED accents and a neon-streaked abstract painting. Finally, the camera advances steadily down the glossy corridor, passing shoji screens and a glass partition wall while moving toward a metal door at the end of the hall.
